# Minimal ELOT ontology fixture for Step 1.3 parser tests.
# Hand-written; independent of examples/ontology-list.tsv. Keep tiny and stable.

#+title: Minimal Test Ontology
#+author: ELOT test suite

* minimal.owl
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       minimal.owl
:ELOT-context-type: ontology
:ELOT-context-localname: minimal.owl
:header-args:omn: :tangle ../minimal.omn :noweb yes
:ELOT-default-prefix: ex
:END:

** Prefixes
:PROPERTIES:
:prefixdefs: yes
:END:

| prefix | uri                                         |
|--------+---------------------------------------------|
| ex:    | http://example.org/ex/                      |
| owl:   | http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#              |
| rdf:   | http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns# |
| rdfs:  | http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#       |
| skos:  | http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#        |
| dc11:  | http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/            |

** minimal.owl ontology (http://example.org/ex/minimal.owl)
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       minimal.owl-ontology-declaration
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:

 - dc11:title :: Minimal Test Ontology

** Classes
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       minimal.owl-class-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** Widget (ex:Widget)
 - rdfs:label :: Widget
 - skos:definition :: A generic widget used for testing.
**** Gadget (ex:Gadget)
 - rdfs:label :: Gadget
 - skos:definition :: A gadget, subclass of widget.


** Object properties
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       minimal.owl-object-property-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** connectsTo (ex:connectsTo)
 - rdfs:label :: connectsTo
 - skos:definition :: Relates one widget to another.

** Annotation properties
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       minimal.owl-annotation-property-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** dc11:title
*** skos:definition
